## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SentinelOne's CVE database project progress, content strategy, and design updates.](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

  - [CVE page designs nearly finalized; development can begin while awaiting minor tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

  - [CVE database launch targeted for mid-October; specifics on content volume and publishing cadence TBD](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

  - [Start with 2025 CVEs and work backwards](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [SEMrush keyword list for CVE-2025 includes \~2,600 keywords (pre-deduplication)](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
